c.d: Total number of active users on the platform, indicating market reach and potential buyer pool
c.s: App store analytics, company reports, market research data

c.d: Whether the app focuses on specific product categories vs general marketplace, affecting target audience fit
c.s: App descriptions, feature analysis, user reviews

c.d: Commission rates, listing fees, and payment processing costs that impact seller profitability
c.s: Official fee schedules, terms of service, seller documentation

c.d: Simplicity and speed of creating listings, including photo upload, description templates, and bulk tools
c.s: User experience testing, app reviews, feature documentation

c.d: Built-in protection mechanisms like buyer/seller verification, secure payments, and dispute resolution
c.s: Platform policies, security features, user feedback
